title: Algerian Tagine Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by Algerian cuisine, made with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and sweet dried fruits.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend, oats, and dried apricots.
Stir to combine, then add 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Stir in the fresh mint leaves.
Serve hot, garnished with additional mint leaves if desired.
